adapter.kind: frontier image/video model prompt DNA adapter
adapter.job: turn creator capsule memory into prompt DNA for model experiments while blocking raw generated media from the public repo

prompt_dna.core_intent: Remember the idea before tools mutate the surface; the output should explain the artifact direction quickly without hiding proof requirements.
prompt_dna.composition: one strong hero statement, one proof object, one memory rail, and no stock dashboard grid
prompt_dna.motion_memory: still preview now; future video variants may scan the memory rail left to right before the proof stamp lands
prompt_dna.negative_space: leave a quiet field around the headline and proof object so generated variants have room for captions, overlays, or print marks
blocked_outputs: raw generated media committed to git

blocked: client copy or unreleased brand assets

retention: retain as adapter edge contract plus synthetic preview gate; do not promote a package primitive or commit generated media until repeated adapters prove the shape
